name: meta-ads-intelligence
description: Meta Ads intelligence layer: Ad Library search, market analysis, creative briefs, anomaly detection, and spend pacing. Complements the official Meta Ads MCP (mcp.facebook.com/ads) which handles read/write campaign operations.

scripts.check: node --check src/server.js && node --check src/metaClient.js && node --check src/metrics.js && node --check src/config.js
